query: SELECT code, designation, unit, unit_price, category FROM bpu_items WHERE category LIKE '%clos%' OR category LIKE '%fermeture%' OR category LIKE '%menuiserie%' OR category LIKE '%serrur%' OR category LIKE '%store%' OR category LIKE '%volet%' OR category LIKE '%porte%' OR designation LIKE '%porte%' OR designation LIKE '%fermeture%' OR designation LIKE '%menuiserie%' OR designation LIKE '%serrur%' OR designation LIKE '%store%' OR designation LIKE '%volet%' OR designation LIKE '%rideau%' OR designation LIKE '%barrière%' OR designation LIKE '%portail%' OR designation LIKE '%clôture%' OR designation LIKE '%grille%' OR designation LIKE '%fenêtre%' OR designation LIKE '%vitrage%' OR designation LIKE '%vitre%' OR designation LIKE '%huisserie%' ORDER BY category, code;
